description: Locked composite floors for the 6 functional Forge benches. Tracks the spec-intended pass threshold (composite_min) plus the calibrated value at lock time. The 2C-2 auto-PR-on-regression workflow consults this floor in addition to its pairwise current-vs-prior comparison. Recalibration follows the protocol in README.md and requires a planned-regression note + adversarial review + user sign-off.

forge-consolidation.note: Code threshold is intentionally looser than spec floor to allow first-calibration runs (recall_delta=0 case scored as INVALID); composites.json floor is the spec-intended steady-state minimum.

forge-context.note: Code threshold is stale first-calibration value; calibrated 1.0 across all 5 dims since 2026-04-16. Tighten to 0.95 as backlog cleanup.

forge-identity.note: Master v6 fix-regression locked at 0.999; 1-row drift in any of the 6 dims would push composite below 0.95 and CATCH it.

forge-persist.note: Survival probe — composite = recovery_rate; floor is 1.0 because any data loss is unacceptable.

regression_policy.rationale: 5% drop alerts; floor enforces the spec contract. Both checked by scripts/ci/check_bench_regression.py + .github/workflows/bench-regression.yml.
